text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, you don't seem very cheery today. Is
something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: N-no. You're mistaken. I am completely myself.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not so sure... I could've sworn you were eating
less than normal today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Urk... The truth is, I had a dream last night about
my grandparents. And now I cannot stop thinking
of my family...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How shameful! Becoming sentimental is the surest
sign of a weak mind! I must train more diligently!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to be ashamed of. I think about
my home a lot.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's right about that. It's natural to want to
see your beloved family again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're here for you if you ever want to talk about
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm very grateful to both of you. Speaking about
it has brought some peace to my mind.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Good. Then you should be ready for a proper
meal. Luckily for us, the restaurant in front of the
station is offering free upgrades to extra large
right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Don't hesitate to let us know if anything else ever
troubles you. Just think of me as your mama.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That... would perhaps be a little strange... Hehe,
but I feel fortunate nonetheless.
